summary: ForJenta IDE critical fixes verified: 1) /api/generate-code works without auth (401-resilient), 2) 'Claude Opus 4.6' label with star icon displayed, 3) Session persistence via localStorage working, 4) Generation flow with input disabled during generation, 5) Regenerate button appears after success, 6) Error handling shows friendly messages. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend features verified through comprehensive Playwright tests.

issues: data-testid for files is 'file-{name}' not 'file-item-{name}' - test selectors adjusted accordingly

critical_code_review_comments: 401-resilient generation flow implemented correctly in sendPrompt() - continues even when prompt registration fails
localStorage persistence properly saves and restores messages, files, and session state
Provider config layer implemented with DEFAULT_PROVIDER containing Claude Opus 4.6 settings
Error cards have retry button with retryLastPrompt() action
Regenerate button only shows after successful assistant messages (not errors)
Input disabled during generation prevents duplicate submissions
seed_data_creation: Used existing project with prompts and generated files
context_for_next_testing_agent: All critical fixes working. Generation takes ~10-30s depending on prompt complexity. localStorage persists across page refreshes. The /api/generate-code endpoint does NOT require auth - it uses Inworld AI backend. Auth endpoints use session_token cookie. Terminal shows stage logs (1/5 through 5/5) during generation.

frontend.with_auth_generation: PASS - Full flow works with session cookie
